title: Anvil Fill PDF Request
description: Request body schema for the Anvil PDF Filling API endpoint POST /api/v1/fill/{pdfTemplateID}.pdf

title.description: Optional title to encode into the PDF document metadata.

fontFamily.description: Font family for text fields. Default is Noto Sans.

fontSize.description: Font size for text fields in points.

textColor.description: Hex color code (6 digits) for text field color.

useInteractiveFields.description: When true, preserves interactive/fillable fields instead of flattening.

defaultReadOnly.description: When true, all fields are set as read-only in the output.

data.description: Field data to fill into the template. Keys are field aliases.

oneOf.description: Single set of field values keyed by field alias.
Array of field value objects for multi-section templates.
